subcodes.first_line: The breezes of grace have wafted forth at this hour from the direction of the mighty Throne. Turn thyself wholly unto them, that thou mayest be cleansed of ailment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد هبت روایح الفضل حینئذ عن جهه عرش عظیم ان اقبل الیها بکلک لتطهرک من داء
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @development of capacity and readiness
